docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $866.00 FILED BY LAMAR, SUZANNE DBA MORE THAN MUTIMEDIA AS TO DEFENDANT ARTFIBERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-22-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-12-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ARTFIBERS
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ARTFIBERS
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-22-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-22-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-22-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAMAR, SUZANNE DBA MORE THAN MUTIMEDIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARTFIBERS $686.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $751.00, **PLAINTIFF IS TO GIVE THE DEFENDANT THE VIDEO MASTER SHE PREPARED WITHIN TEN DAYS OF RECEIVING FULL PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FROM DEFENDANT.** STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
